RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crsf_next_tableidgen.sql
RuleSet.GenFile: -- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sf_next_tableidgen$( \\ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ ) \\ dynamic result sets 1 \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ declare NextId smallint; \\ declare retcurs cursor with return to client for \\ select NextId from sysibm.sysdummy1; \\ begin \\ call $sp_next_tableidgen$( $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first passArg each passCommaArg )$, NextId ); \\ open retcurs; \\ end; \\ end

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sf_next_tableidgen$( \\ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ ) \\ dynamic result sets 1 \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ declare NextId int; \\ declare retcurs cursor with return to client for \\ select NextId from sysibm.sysdummy1; \\ begin \\ call $sp_next_tableidgen$( $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first passArg each passCommaArg )$, NextId ); \\ open retcurs; \\ end; \\ end

-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ create or replace procedure $sf_next_tableidgen$( \\ $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first sparg_TableCol each sparg_CommaTableCol )$ ) \\ dynamic result sets 1 \\ modifies sql data \\ language sql \\ begin \\ declare NextId bigint; \\ declare retcurs cursor with return to client for \\ select NextId from sysibm.sysdummy1; \\ begin \\ call $sp_next_tableidgen$( $reference Dispenser reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( first passArg each passCommaArg )$, NextId ); \\ open retcurs; \\ end; \\ end
